title: MeridianAI repo config
description: Optional config for MeridianAI's PR reviews. Everything here is optional — an empty file gives a good default review.

depth.description: Review intensity preset (sets max_comments/min_confidence/min_severity, individually overridable).

max_comments.description: Hard cap on inline comments per PR.

min_confidence.description: Drop AI findings below this confidence score.

min_severity.description: Drop AI findings below this severity.

ignore.description: Glob patterns for paths MeridianAI should never review.

focus.description: Glob patterns for paths reviewed with 'strict' thresholds regardless of `depth`.

instructions.description: Free-text team preferences injected into the reviewer prompt.

categories.description: Turn whole finding categories on/off, e.g. { bug: true, style: false }.

rules.description: Deterministic rules that always fire (bypass the AI critic).
